mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file (table_name, table_id, path) VALUES (#{tableName}, #{tableId}, #{path})
mapper.select: SELECT path FROM file WHERE table_name = #{tableName} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND path LIKE '%/model/%' ORDER BY create_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT path FROM file WHERE table_name = #{tableName} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND path LIKE '%/thumbnail/%' ORDER BY create_date DESC LIMIT 1
